page_metadata.biotools__summary: DispHred is server to predict pH-dependent order-disorder transitions in intrinsically disordered proteins. DispHred uses a sliding window to calculate hydrophobicity and net charge.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DispHred is server to predict pH-dependent order-disorder transitions in intrinsically disordered proteins. DispHred uses a sliding window to calculate hydrophobicity and net charge.
